title: 2 Bunches Artificial Peonies, Pink Silk Peony Fake Flowers Bouquet for Wedding Home Decor
features: Realistic Artificial Peony Flowers: Made with high-quality silk fabric, the leaves have a realistic appearance, full flower heads, vivid and natural, the stems are made of wire-wrapped plastic, the stems can be trimmed or bent, and the flower heads can be used to decorate cakes or DIY floral decorations.

Artificial bouquets are easy to maintain:. These fake flowers don't wilt and don't need watering or sunlight, and fake peony bouquets are a great option for those of us who don't have time to care for fake flowers. If there is dust or other stains, simply blow them off with a low-temperature hair dryer or wipe them with a soft cloth or sponge.

Wide range of applications for home decoration: artificial peonies, silk flowers are suitable for bridal bouquets, wedding parties, DIY flower arrangements or any centerpiece. It will be a decoration for kitchens, living rooms, dining tables, bedrooms, terraces, gardens, offices, hotels, Halloween, Christmas, and other occasions to add color and vibrancy to your indoor or outdoor space

Size & Packing: Includes 2 bouquets of peony flowers, each with 5 large peony flowers, 4 small flower buds, and some foamy flower spikes and berries. The length of the bouquet is about 32 cm/12.6 inches, and the diameter of the 5 large flower heads is about 2.36 inches. The overall proportional distribution presents a very good visual effect.

Note: artificial flowers may be flattened during shipping. Simply let them sit for a while and then gently adjust each stem manually to restore their original fluffiness. These peonies will soon regain their original plumpness and vividness.
